## Summary / Кратко


## Type of Change / Тип изменения

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Methodology/model update
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests/QA
- [ ] Licensing/notices

## Methodology Impact / Влияние на методологию

- [ ] No methodology impact
- [ ] Updates scenario/event/KPI/public-support/budget logic
- [ ] Updates interpretation or classroom use
- [ ] `docs/methodology.md` updated

## Checks / Проверки

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:i18n`
- [ ] README local links/images checked

## Notes for Review / Заметки для ревью
